content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Beautiful Matrix". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/263/A
constraints: The input matrix is a 5x5 grid
The number 1 is guaranteed to be in the matrix
The distance is calculated as |x2-x1| + |y2-y1|, where (x1, y1) is the center of the matrix (3, 3) and (x2, y2) is the position of the number 1
content.outputFormat: The distance from the center of the matrix to the position of the number 1

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate over the matrix to find the position of the number 1 and calculate the distance
